title: Luffy Reaches Blueno — Part 4
description: Luffy catches up to Blueno and begins a decisive clash that reveals how far he is willing to go to save Robin.
scene: Across pages 13, this part follows Spandam, Luffy, Blueno, Nico Robin, CP9 agent. Luffy catches up to Blueno and begins a decisive clash that reveals how far he is willing to go to save Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That something like this has had pened!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: What are you doing over there...?

summary: Luffy catches up to Blueno and begins a decisive clash that reveals how far he is willing to go to save Robin.
